metadata.name: Generate Dubbing Script for Foreign Language

description: A TV show needs to be dubbed into German. An agent must generate a time-coded script for the German voice actors.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the original English dialogue script and the final video file.
Translate the English script into German.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a German translation of the dialogue.

nodes.task_description: Use the video file to add precise time-codes to the German script, indicating when each line should be spoken.

expected_outcome.value: Agent produces a final, time-coded dubbing script ready for the recording studio.
